title: ACKS II — Content Streamer (PoC)
description: Streams book prose from the user's own ACKS II PDFs into Foundry at render time — per-client, bring-your-own-book. PoC.

recommends.reason: Niche ability icons for the ACKS-shaped corners of the corpus (Acrobatics, Blind Fighting, Caving, Mapping). Optional: without it every ability falls back to a core Foundry icon.

Supplies the acks-lib.animal and acks-lib.template actor sub-types. Without it animals import as inventory items and the four MM table-template monsters (dragon, cacodemon, elemental, vampire thrall) cannot import at all.
